depends_on.name: stimulus_response_scalar_id
depends_on.documentation: The document ID of the stimulus_response_scalar these parameters describe.

fields.name: response_window
fields.documentation: Two-element row vector [t_start, t_end] in seconds defining the time window over which the scalar response is computed, relative to stimulus onset.

fields.name: baseline_window
fields.documentation: Two-element row vector [t_start, t_end] in seconds defining the baseline time window used for response normalisation, relative to stimulus onset.

fields.name: computation_method
fields.documentation: The method used to compute the scalar response (e.g., 'mean', 'f1f0', 'max').
